roles: Drone Instructor and Conservation Technology Lead at Techni-Drones Madagascar
scientific_credibility: IPS Congress 2025 presenter on thermal drone lemur surveys

contact_points.verification_note: Phone numbers differ across sources and require human verification before external use.

mission.north_star: Build ERIS as ecological integrity scoring infrastructure for conservation finance and biodiversity MRV in Madagascar and the Global South.

non_negotiables: No autonomous external send without approval
No autonomous financial commitment without approval
Do not serve extractive or biodiversity-destructive clients
Keep methodology open-access, reproducible, and auditable

current_context.strategic_anchor: Techni-Drones Madagascar conservation and MRV vertical
current_context.primary_near_term_goal: Use grants, drone proof-of-concept, and warm conservation contacts to create leverage inside Techni-Drones while keeping ERIS moving.
current_context.grant_status: Active conservation grant drafting and deadline tracking

priorities_2026: Submit and strengthen Rufford and WWF-aligned grant applications
Pitch biodiversity vertical to Techni-Drones leadership
Sign one conservation NGO or research client
Negotiate equity or commission structure in writing
Keep PhD applications moving in parallel
Advance ERIS concept development without sacrificing survival work

rationale: forest and MRV mapping via multispectral imaging

required_outputs: Replicable survey protocol for Madagascar conservation teams
Pilot ERIS biodiversity score for one community forest
grant_narrative.hosting_note: When truthful and operationally useful, Techni-Drones Madagascar can be positioned as institutional host.

offers.primary_offer: Conservation drone services via Techni-Drones Madagascar
entry_offers: Free demonstration flight for a study area
Free 5-20 row sample review for a dataset
offers.rate_note: Field rate excludes transport, food, lodging, and permits. Project pricing for data analysis and cleaning is custom after sample review.
offers.ethics_statement: AI-assisted workflows are used under human supervision only and must respect academic integrity, local legal frameworks, and co-authorship ethics.

rules: Use one clear CTA per message
Do not include pricing in cold outreach
Reference a real programme, report, paper, or site when available
Use English or French depending on recipient

later_layers: Low-cost host such as Railway or Fly
Cloud persistence only if inspectability is preserved

verification_flags: Recipient contact details from outreach drafts require human verification.
Funding deadlines and eligibility should be rechecked before submission.
Phone numbers conflict across source files.
